# Lookup highsev sort (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `gx_03_ioc_ip` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Lookup highsev sort.

```sql
dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip | filter severity >= 80 | sort desc severity | fields indicator, threat, severity, first_seen
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 7). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
